'''Divas''' were a religious order of [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Theelin/Legends|Theelin]] singers. Toward the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], most Theelin females were given the title of Diva, regardless of their vocal talents in order to preserve the culture of a dwindling population.

*"[[Podracing Tales]]"
